caption: A static screen displays "Acknowledgments" in large, centered text at the top. On the left side of the screen, names are listed under three geographic or institutional headings: "MIT" followed by Rebecca Saxe, Laura Ligouri, and Nir Jacoby; "Other US" followed by Nour Ktely, Adam Waytz, and Mina Ocara; and "Hungary" followed by Hanna Szekeres and Anna Kende. To the right of these lists, names are listed under the heading "Beyond Conflict," including Tim Phillips, Lee-Or Karlinsky, and Ina Breuer. On the right side of the screen, three logos are stacked vertically: the Open Society Foundations logo featuring a stylized spiral, the blue and white DARPA logo, and a colorful circular emblem for the "DEPARTMENT OF THE INTERIOR" and "Science & Technology." The scene remains completely motionless across all frames, with no change in the text, logos, or layout.
